T1 7B inference + T2 100M training physical ceiling 100% ossified. T1: tensor_last_row builtin 추가, slice 143ms→0.006ms 박멸, 2.96→17.95 tok/s (6.07x), gap 43x→7.1x. Chain_f32 55ms/128seq는 Accelerate sgemm × 32 layers × r=16 물리 한계. T2 100M alphabeta4 5.78ms/step median (3.7-7.3 range) 유지, 10.8x PyTorch advantage. verdict: CPU 물리 한계 도달, 128 tok/s는 GPU 필수.
